breaking.title: West Asia War updates: U.S. strikes Iran after Hormuz tanker attacks
breaking.summary: U.S. Central Command said the "powerful" strikes were in response to Iranian attacks on ships transiting the vital waterway and would "impose heavy costs for targeting and attacking commercial shipping.

breaking.title: Baruipur rape-murder case: West Bengal Police intensify probe; examine shack as possible crime scene
breaking.summary: “Three arrested accused were being questioned even as investigators were awaiting the forensic and viscera examination reports,” says senior police officer

breaking.title: 9 policemen killed in terrorist attack in Balochistan
Dollar at week-high after US resumes attacks on Iran
breaking.summary: The dollar reached its highest weekly level against peers amid renewed U.S. strikes on Iran. Geopolitical tensions escalated, and oil prices saw an increase following the attacks. Concerns over peace deal stability reemerged after Iran's actions in the Strait of Hormuz. Global yields jumped higher as inflation outlook worries intensified for investors. Other currencies like the euro and pound experienced slight declines against the dollar.

breaking.title: Global Crackdown On Lawrence Bishnoi Gang: 24 Arrested, Assassination Plot Busted
breaking.summary: One of the most serious allegations centers on the Bishnoi criminal enterprise, led by Lawrence Bishnoi.

breaking.title: US oil prices jump after US military launches strikes against Iran
breaking.summary: U.S. oil prices increased significantly after military strikes against Iran.  These actions followed Iranian attacks on three commercial vessels in the Strait of Hormuz.  A Qatari liquefied natural gas tanker reported being struck by a drone.  Maritime security sources indicated a Saudi-flagged crude oil tanker was also damaged.  Fears of disruptions to tanker traffic through the Strait of Hormuz have resurfaced.

breaking.title: NCERT publishes revised Class 8 Social Science textbook, rewrites controversial chapter on judiciary
breaking.summary: The controversial portions along with references to judicial backlog and two major court verdicts have been dropped; the revised textbook states in its acknowledgements that it has been published pursuant to the review process undertaken by complying with the Supreme Court’s directions

breaking.title: Watch: Buckling support beams seen inside New York high-rise
breaking.summary: The structure, which is under construction, was evacuated along with surrounding buildings after reports of falling bricks.
